channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Should California's minimum wage be $18? Voters will soon decide
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Voters will decide in November whether California should raise its hourly minimum wage to $18 by 2026 and pay workers what would be the highest statewide minimum wage in the country.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING and SOPHIE AUSTIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 7-Eleven to close over 400 locations in North America
item.description: The company cited slow sales, declining traffic, inflationary pressures and a decrease in cigarette purchases.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, NewsNation

item.title: Bomb survivors use Nobel Peace Prize win to share their anti-nuke message with younger generations
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — The recipient of this year's Nobel Peace Prize is a fast-dwindling group of atomic bomb survivors who are facing down the shrinking time they have left to convey the firsthand horror they witnessed 79 years ago. Nihon Hidankyo, the Japanese organization of survivors of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What's behind the northern lights that dazzled the sky farther south than normal
item.description: Another in a series of unusually strong solar storms hitting Earth produced stunning skies full of pinks, purples, greens and blues farther south than normal, including into parts of Germany, the United Kingdom, New England and New York City.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Far from where Hurricane Milton hit, tornadoes wrought unexpected damage
item.description: WELLINGTON, Fla. (AP) — Tony Brazzale, a diving boat captain who has lived for 10 years in his Wellington home in southeastern Florida, wasn't worried about Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT and CHRISTOPHER L. KELLER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Floridians evacuated for Hurricane Milton after wake-up call from devastating Helene
item.description: BRANDON, Fla. (AP) — Florida residents who fled hundreds of miles to escape Hurricane Milton made slow trips home on crowded highways, weary from their long journeys and the cleanup work awaiting them but also grateful to be coming back alive.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY ONEIL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: UK leader Keir Starmer is marking 100 days in office. It has been a rocky ride
item.description: LONDON (AP) — British Prime Minister Keir Starmer marks 100 days in office Saturday with little cause for celebration. Starmer’s center-left Labour Party was elected by a landslide on July 4, sweeping back to power after 14 years.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Over 9 million pounds of ready-to-eat meat, poultry recalled: USDA
item.description: The products may be contaminated with Listeria monocytogenes, according to the U.S. Department of Agriculture.
item.dc:creator: Michael Reiner, KTLA 5

item.title: No Dem effort to stymie Trump election win certification: Strategists
item.description: A few Democratic lawmakers say they will accept a free and fair Trump election win, but aren't sure he'll be fair or honest.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Venice Beach home buried in sand after Milton
item.description: While most people are dealing with water in their homes, some homeowners are battling an inundation of sand.
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, WGN 9

item.title: Comer slams Raskin over his election certification comments: 'Ultimate hypocrite'
item.description: House Oversight Chairman James Comer (R-Ky.) condemned comments from Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.), calling him “the ultimate hypocrite” after the Democrat claimed former President Trump is trying to manipulate the electoral college.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Residents slog through flooded streets, clear debris after Hurricane Milton tore through Florida
item.description: LITHIA, Fla. (AP) — Florida residents slogged through flooded streets, gathered up scattered debris and assessed damage to their homes on Friday after Hurricane Milton smashed through coastal communities and spawned a barrage of deadly tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS O'MEARA, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY O'NEIL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: North Carolina governor blasts 'flat out lie' from Trump on disaster aid
item.description: "Trump’s lies and conspiracy theories have hurt the morale of first responders and people who lost everything, helped scam artists and put government and rescue workers in danger," said North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: What to know as Florida residents begin cleaning up after Hurricane Milton
item.description: Cleanup from Hurricane Milton was underway Friday as residents returned home after the storm barreled across Florida, spawning tornadoes, knocking out power to millions, damaging homes and leading to hundreds of rescues.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 3 Europeans engineered $95M Texas Lotto win with over 25M tickets
item.description: It was successful for one group last year, but Texas Lottery officials have made changes to inhibit anyone else from trying it.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, KRON4

item.title: Elevator door was 'broken' during Colorado mine tour accident that killed 1 and trapped 12
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Investigators on Friday were trying to figure out what led to an elevator accident inside a former Colorado gold mine that killed a tour guide, injured four others and left a separate group of 12 people trapped for hours at the bottom of the tourist attraction 1,000 feet (305 meters) b
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW BROWN, AMY BETH HANSON, MEAD GRUVER and JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: TikTok was aware of risks kids and teens face on its platform, legal document alleges
item.description: TikTok was aware that its design features are detrimental to its young users and that publicly touted tools aimed at limiting kids’ time on the site were largely ineffective, according to internal documents and communications exposed in lawsuit filed by the state of Kentucky.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Allred pushes back on Cruz transgender attack ads
item.description: “Ted Cruz is lying again, but now he's lying about our children. I'm a dad. I'm also a Christian,” Allred said on camera.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Actress Jessica Chastain slams airline over $15 credit
item.description: The actress was unhappy after the seatback screen didn't work on her recent Jet Blue flight. So, she took to X, formerly Twitter, to express her dismay.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KRON4

item.title: Biden to visit Hurricane Milton-ravaged Florida with damage estimates 'around $50 billion'
item.description: The White House announced President Biden is scheduled to visit Florida on Sunday to survey the aftermath of Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trial on hold for New Jersey man charged in knife attack that injured Salman Rushdie
item.description: The attempted murder trial of the man charged with injuring author Salman Rushdie in a 2022 knife attack in New York has been put on hold.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tennessee authorities trying to dispose of large box with dynamite that prompted evacuations
item.description: A box filled with dynamite found at a metal recycling plant in Tennessee was being handled by police, who are trying to dispose of the contents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Latest: Residents begin repairing damage from Hurricane Milton, which killed at least 10
item.description: Florida residents began repairing damage from Hurricane Milton, which smashed through coastal communities and tore homes to pieces, flooded streets and spawned a deadly tornadoes. At least 10 people are dead, but many expressed relief that Milton wasn’t worse.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: This restaurant-based Halloween costume is trending in Las Vegas, according to Google
item.description: The search interest in specific costumes appeared to vary widely from region to region, but there were definitely some common themes.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 7-Eleven to close over 400 'underperforming' locations in North America
item.description: The company cited slow sales, declining traffic, inflationary pressures, and a decrease in cigarette purchases among the reasons why some stores are closing.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Experts warn 'crazy busy' Atlantic hurricane season is far from over
item.description: Millions of people in the southeastern U.S. still are reeling from the catastrophic damage caused by Hurricanes Helene and Milton, but scientists warn that the Atlantic hurricane season is far from over. “As far as hurricane landfalls in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida Gov. DeSantis helps Waffle House employees cook for first responders
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis put on the gloves and picked up a spatula at a Sarasota-area Waffle House on Thursday to help cook for first responders after Hurricane Milton left a path of destruction across the Tampa Bay area.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New ‘Harry Potter’ Squishmallows are here — and there’s a Dobby
item.description: Squishmallows just released a whole new set of "Harry Potter" toys, just in time for the holidays — and they're super cute, too.
item.dc:creator: Christina Marfice, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Satellite images show before and after Hurricane Milton along Gulf Coast
item.description: Satellite images showcases the widespread damage and destruction left behind in Florida after Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan newspaper issues correction after Trump claims he won Man of Year award
item.description: A Michigan newspaper issued a correction after former President Donald Trump cited the paper at a speech in Detroit claiming he was Michigan’s “Man of the Year” in 2023.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Residents slog through flooded streets, pick up debris after Milton
item.description: Florida residents slogged through flooded streets, gathered up scattered debris and assessed damage to their homes on Friday after Hurricane Milton smashed through coastal communities and tore homes to pieces, flooded streets and spawned a barrage of deadly tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: CBS sides with the howling mob
item.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Parents warned of disturbing kidnapping scheme using kids' voice replicas
item.description: Recent advancements in artificial intelligence technology is making it easier for bad actors to convince people they have kidnapped their loved ones in an extortion scheme.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rare comet to be visible in California starting this weekend
item.description: Look up into the sky this month, and you'll see a comet that won’t return for tens of thousands of years.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, KTLA 5

item.title: The Latest: Milton causes widespread power outages and several deaths in Florida
item.description: Hurricane Milton brought powerful winds, a dangerous storm surge and flooding to much of Florida after making landfall along the Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm. It weakened as it plowed through Florida late Wednesday into Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump campaign blasts Bob Woodward; denies secret Putin calls
item.description: Donald Trump's campaign is rejecting claims in Bob Woodward's new book 'War' about the former president holding secret calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5
